reviews.author: Lord Dragonator
reviews.title: If I could give ZERO stars I would 100%
reviews.content:
The most disgusting credit card company ever been with.

Despite 100% proof of fraud, if you become a victim of fraud while using their card you will NOT get anything sorted out and get told you have to 100% continue payments and will harm you credit score if you do not.

Just had my investigation into the fraud I have experienced denied despite complete proof that I was taken advantage of and 100% proof showing I was over 180 miles away when someone used my stolen card details in person to make 2 purchases, one of which I was able to cancel through text.

It is and can be proven that I was 180 miles away when this in person transaction took place, yet I am now being forced to pay for clear and obvious fraud.

Such a shame as I thought they were a reputable company when I looked into them.

100% be aware, if you are a victim of fraud like I have been, you will still be made to pay for it.

STAY CLEAR OF Zopa

reviews.author: Thatenglishfellow
reviews.title: Misleading marketing. Clunky app.
reviews.content:
The maximum Cashback you can earn each month is £2.50 (2% of £125 - that’s just £30 per year), and as Zopa doesn’t offer switching, you’ll have to spend hours manually transferring all your bills to this account. That alone makes it not worth the time and effort to set it up. 

The linked 7.1% regular saver sounds excellent but is no better as it ‘matures’ after just 6 months, so the maximum interest you can earn is just £36. What could you buy for that, and is it worth waiting 6 months to get it ‘free’?  

The 2% interest on account balances IS good for a current account as of March 2026, but that is still much lower than inflation, (the rising cost of living) so any money left in it is effectively getting smaller not bigger. 

The app itself is very basic and clunky, and lacks almost all of real time functionality and features common with most fintech challenger banks today. 

This account has excellent headlines, but falls very short when you look at the fine print. Get one if you just want an extra account to put money for bills aside - if you can bare the hassle of transferring them manually, but DON’T keep your money in it if you have more than £300 left over each month to save.

reviews.author: Brad616.
reviews.title: Worst bank I’ve been with.
reviews.content:
I’m extremely disappointed with my experience with Zopa. I withdrew £130 from a cash machine, but the machine only dispensed £120. I reported the issue immediately, expecting it to be investigated properly and the missing £10 refunded.

However, Zopa failed to resolve the issue and did not refund the missing amount. Despite explaining that the ATM underpaid me, they did not take meaningful action to correct the error. As a customer, you trust your bank to handle disputes like this fairly and efficiently. especially when it involves an ATM withdrawal discrepancy.

It’s frustrating to feel like your concerns aren’t taken seriously over what should be a straightforward claim. £10 may not be a large amount to a bank, but it matters to customers. I expected better support and accountability.

Based on this experience, I’m very disappointed in Zopa’s handling of the situation and their lack of customer care.

Please stay away from this bank. It’s worrying to think that if this happened to someone else for a much larger sum, they might not be covered either.

insights.summary: Users frequently encounter technical issues such as app crashes, slow or failed transactions, and login problems. Customer service is widely reported as unresponsive, slow, and ineffective, especially regarding account access and fraud cases. Additionally, many users experience account access problems including frozen accounts, blocked payments, and difficulties receiving SMS codes or updating contact details.

examples: App keeps locking up and needs re-download daily
App often logs me out and requires passcode reset
App is riddled with bugs causing money to disappear

examples: Customer service is non existent, avoid!
No feedback or callbacks from support
Customer service just repeats problem like a broken AI
topProblems.name: Poor Customer Service

Can't receive SMS code for login due to old number
Payments are delayed or blocked affecting bills and credit rating
